name: Soundwave|WaveWave
description:
Shockwave's POV

Soundwave saves you during an Autobot attack, and now he needs to brag about it.

______________

I don't really know what I'm doing XD. I usually keep my bots to myself, but since there isn't much content about them, I decided to share it <3 So please excuse the bad writing or any mistakes, I hope you have fun!
